backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing per-player game state (health, ammunition, score, enemies defeated) with functions to start games, take damage, recharge weapons, increase score, defeat enemies, and query state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting six implemented features: 3D FPS environment with React Three Fiber, shooting mechanics, arena with obstacles, enemy targets, game state management, and HUD display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files including components, hooks, and styling files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a timeless, atmospheric shooter aesthetic.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx, titled 'Timeless'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the Game component with full-screen styling and game theme CSS import.
frontend/src/components/Arena.tsx: 3D game arena component with physics-enabled floor, walls, obstacles, skybox texture, and enemy placement using react-three/cannon.
frontend/src/components/Enemy.tsx: Enemy target component with physics box collider, health-based color changes, animated rotation, health bar display, and destruction state handling.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game orchestrator managing Canvas, Physics, Player, Arena, HUD, pointer lock controls, instructions overlay, and enemy hit detection logic.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Visual health bar component displaying current health as a percentage with gradient fill styling.
frontend/src/components/HUD.tsx: Heads-up display overlay showing crosshair, score, health bar, ammunition count, and footer attribution with caffeine.ai link.
frontend/src/components/MuzzleFlash.tsx: Animated muzzle flash effect positioned relative to camera with texture, additive blending, and opacity fade-out animation.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: First-person player controller with physics-based movement, mouse look, raycasting for shooting, and enemy hit detection. Manages player sphere collider, camera position/rotation, and triggers weapon firing with muzzle flash effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes due to authentication state updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnemies.ts: Manages a list of enemy entities with positions, health, and destruction state. Provides a damageEnemy callback that reduces health and marks enemies as destroyed when health reaches zero.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Synchronizes local game state (health, ammo, score, enemies defeated) with backend state via queries and mutations. Provides callbacks for game initialization, ammo decrement, enemy defeat, and damage handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages login flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerControls.ts: Tracks WASD keyboard input and mouse movement for player controls. Returns current control state and a function to retrieve and reset accumulated mouse movement.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend game state operations including fetching game state and mutations for starting game, taking damage, defeating enemies, increasing score, and recharging weapons.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeapon.ts: Manages weapon firing state with rate limiting and muzzle flash timing. Returns a fire callback that enforces fire rate cooldown and triggers a 100ms muzzle flash effect.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for a dark-themed game UI using OKLCH color space. Defines CSS variables for colors, spacing, and chart themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/styles/game-theme.css: Custom CSS for game UI styling including HUD elements (crosshair, health bar, ammo counter, stats), cards, buttons, and glowing effects using OKLCH colors and backdrop filters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for a 3D first-person shooter game called 'Timeless' with ethereal aesthetic, tracking 7 implemented features (player movement, shooting mechanics, arena, enemies, game state, HUD, visual style) and required image assets.
